headline: Rollins Inc. (ROL) At 52-Week Lows Despite Steady Long-Term Contracts
summary: Rollins Inc. (NYSE:ROL) is one of the Best 52-Week Low Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. Rollins Inc. (NYSE:ROL) reports its Q1 2026 earnings report on April 23. The company reported revenue of $906.42 million, comfortably beating the Wall Street consensus of $894.58 million. The earnings per share came in at $0.24, which met […]

headline: Rollins Stock: Analyst Estimates & Ratings
summary: Rollins has underperformed the broader market over the past year, and analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Rollins, Lowers Price Target to $55
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jason Haas   maintains Rollins (NYSE:ROL) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $58 to $55.
